#6 JUDGE:DONNA LITTLE; S.SAWYER/CSR; GVANHEST/CLERK. 2:44PM CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLAINTIFF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL DHAVAL PANCHAL, DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED AND A JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION IS READ INTO THE RECORD AND SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES IN OPEN COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LONIS, SAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 735 TAYLOR STREET, ROOM 202, S.F., STAYED UNTIL JUN-10-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. PLTF WVS BACK RENT & DAMAGES. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS INCLUDING 1542CC NO ONE ELSE CAN CLAIM RIGHT TO POSSESS PREMISES. PLTF WILL NOR REPORT THIS ACTION TO A CREDIT AGENCY. DEFT WILL NOT DAMAGE THE PREMISES.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
